strengths: ~17-year career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and backend engineering satisfies the minimum 15-year experience threshold
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks), showing awareness of the AI tooling landscape
Founded GISCollective — an open-source, event-driven geospatial platform used in production by NGOs — demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative and platform-building experience
concerns: AI depth is shallow and very recent: the only AI work appears in a role started April 2025, limited to MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — contributor-level tooling, not the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale' the role demands

No evidence of director-level IC scope: the candidate has never held a principal, staff-plus, or director-equivalent title in a strategic capacity, and there is zero record of advising strategic customers or partners, shaping organizational AI/cloud strategy, or influencing beyond their immediate team

Education credentials do not meet the preferred bar: a 2012 BS in Computer Science and a BFA in Photography are the only degrees listed — no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, no published AI research, and no external recognition as an AI expert
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable generalist engineer with genuine breadth, but he is applying two to three levels below what this role demands in both seniority and specialization. His entire AI experience amounts to a few months of MCP tooling work at a small firm — there is no history of building AI-powered products at scale, no cloud platform architecture credentials, and no record of advising strategic customers on AI adoption. His career trajectory is that of a strong senior-to-staff individual contributor executing within teams, not a director-level IC who sets technical direction and inspires change across organizations. The absence of an advanced AI degree, external recognition, or any published or market-facing AI work makes this a weak fit for a role whose core value proposition is recognized, strategic AI expertise.
